problem.passage:
21. Read the following and answer the question. [1.5점]
[The teacher speaks in front of the class in the classroom.]
T: OK, today we’ve learned how to construct a topic
sentence. You did a good job. Here’s your homework.
First, write a paragraph about your weekend plans and
post it on our class blog. Second, you should respond
to at least two persons’ writings. When you give
comments, please focus on content as well as on
grammar. If you need to, you can visit some grammar
websites that are linked to the class blog. I have already
posted the evaluation criteria on the blog. If you have
any questions, log into the chat room from 8 to 9 pm
on Thursday, and I’ll answer them. See you then.
Which of the following is NOT a correct statement about the
assignment above?
It can be done with the help of online resources. ①
It allows students to utilize synchronous communication. ②
It compels students to exchange feedback with each other. ③
It creates a computer-mediated communication environment. ④
It requires students to post their scoring rubric on the blog. ⑤
영 어 (15면

_extraction.note: 자동 추출 초안. passage/meta/answer 모두 수동 보완 필요.
